    · -- U ∼ empty case (numElts U 0)

        have honto := hf.right

        have : f u1 = f u2 := hfzn this
        exact hone this
      · obtain ⟨f, hone, honto⟩ := hdenum
        use fzn ∘ f

        have : f u1 = f u2 := hfzn heq
        exact hone this

    intro ⟨f, hf⟩

    have hu1 : u1 ∈ Univ U := by define; trivial
    have hu2 : u2 ∈ Univ U := by define; trivial
    have hRu1 : (u1, g u1) ∈ R := hg.right.right u1 hu1
    have hRu2 : (u2, g u2) ∈ R := hg.right.right u2 hu2
    rw [hgu] at hRu1
    exact matching_one_one hRmaps hu1 hu2 hRu1 hRu2

        · intro hu

        · intro hu
          define at hu
          define
          use f u
          define
      · -- Range of R is image f (Univ U)

        constructor

          define

          constructor
          · define; trivial

          define

          constructor
          · define; trivial
          · define

      · -- one_to_one as relation in one direction
        intro u1 n1 n2 h1 h2
        define at h1 h2
        rw [h1, h2]
      · -- one_to_one as relation in other direction
        intro u1 u2 n h1 h2
        define at h1 h2
        rw [← h1] at h2
        exact hf u1 u2 h2

  apply Iff.intro

    intro h
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum] at h
    obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨R, hR1, hR2, hR3⟩ := hI
    define at hR2 hR3
    have hex : ∀ (x : U), ∃ (n : Nat), (x, n) ∈ R := by
      intro x
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hR2 x
      exact ⟨n, hn⟩
    set f : U → Nat := fun x => Classical.choose (hex x) with hf
    use f
    define
    intro x1 x2 hfeq
    have h1 : (x1, f x1) ∈ R := Classical.choose_spec (hex x1)
    have h2 : (x2, f x2) ∈ R := Classical.choose_spec (hex x2)
    rw [hfeq] at h1
    exact hR3 x1 x2 (f x2) h1 h2
  · -- ∃ f, one_to_one f → ctble U
    intro ⟨f, hf⟩

    define
    use graph f
    constructor
    · define
      intro p hp
      define at hp
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hp
      constructor
      · exact hx.left
      · exact ⟨x, hx.right⟩
    constructor
    · define
      intro x
      use f x
      define
      exact ⟨x, rfl⟩
    · define

      define at h1 h2
      obtain ⟨a1, ha1⟩ := h1
      obtain ⟨a2, ha2⟩ := h2
      rw [← ha1.left, ← ha2.left]
      have : f a1 = f a2 := by rw [ha1.right, ha2.right]
      exact hf this

      exact hf heq
    · intro ⟨n, u, hu⟩
      use u
      simp
      exact hu

        intro x y hxy

      exact ⟨f, hf.left⟩

    intro ⟨f, hf⟩

by
  apply Iff.intro
  · -- ctble U → ∃ f, one_to_one f
    intro h1
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum] at h1
    obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := h1
    obtain ⟨R, h2, h3, h4⟩ := hI
    have hex : ∀ (x : U), ∃ (n : Nat), R x n := by
      intro x
      exact h3 x
    set f : U → Nat := fun x => Classical.choose (hex x)
    use f
    define
    intro x1 x2 hf
    have hRx1 : R x1 (f x1) := Classical.choose_spec (hex x1)
    have hRx2 : R x2 (f x2) := Classical.choose_spec (hex x2)
    rw [hf] at hRx1
    exact h2 x1 x2 (f x2) hRx1 hRx2
  · -- ∃ f, one_to_one f → ctble U
    intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum]
    set I : Set Nat := range f
    use I
    define
    set R : Rel U Nat := fun x n => f x = n
    use R
    apply And.intro
    · -- fcnl_on R (Univ U)
      define
      intro x _
      exists_unique
      · use f x
        define
      · intro n1 n2 hn1 hn2
        define at hn1 hn2
        rw [← hn1, ← hn2]
    apply And.intro
    · -- ∀ x, ∃ n ∈ I, R x n
      intro x
      use f x
      apply And.intro
      · define; use x
      · define
    · -- ∀ n ∈ I, ∃! x, R x n
      intro n hn
      define at hn
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hn
      exists_unique
      · use x
        define
        exact hx
      · intro x1 x2 h1 h2
        define at h1 h2
        rw [← h1, ← h2] at hx
        have : f x1 = f x2 := by rw [h1, h2]
        exact hf this

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum] at h
    obtain ⟨A, hA⟩ := h
    rw [Set.equinum_def] at hA
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := hA
    have hfonto : onto f := hf.2
    have hfoto : one_to_one f := hf.1
    obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := onto_iff_right_inv.mp hfonto
    use g
    exact one_one_of_has_left_inv f hfoto hg
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum]
    use range f
    rw [Set.equinum_def]
    use fun u => ⟨f u, u, rfl⟩
    constructor
    · intro u1 u2 h
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at h
      exact hf h
    · intro ⟨n, u, hu⟩
      use u
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq]
      exact hu

by
  apply Iff.intro
  · -- ctble U → ∃ f, one_to_one f
    intro h
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum] at h
    obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨R, hR1, hR2, hR3⟩ := hS
    have hf : ∃ (f : U → Nat), one_to_one f := by
      set f : U → Nat := fun u => (hR2 u).choose with hfdef
      use f
      define
      intro u1 u2 hfu
      have h1 := (hR2 u1).choose_spec
      have h2 := (hR2 u2).choose_spec
      simp only [hfdef] at hfu
      rw [hfu] at h1
      exact hR3 u1 u2 (hR2 u2).choose h1 h2
    exact hf
  · -- ∃ f, one_to_one f → ctble U
    intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum]
    use range f
    define
    use graph f
    constructor
    · define
      intro p hp
      obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := hp
      constructor
      · exact hu.left
      · use u
        exact hu.right
    constructor
    · intro u
      use f u
      define
      use u
    · intro u1 u2 n h1 h2
      define at h1 h2
      obtain ⟨u1', hu1'1, hu1'2⟩ := h1
      obtain ⟨u2', hu2'1, hu2'2⟩ := h2
      have : u1 = u1' := hu1'1
      have : u2 = u2' := hu2'1
      rw [this, hu2'1]
      have heq : f u1' = f u2' := by rw [hu1'2, hu2'2]
      exact hf heq
